calendar.matters: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-24-2026 Continued To Sep-09-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default; Memorandum Of Michelle Fuller, Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Michelle Christine; Exhibits A-D
Off Calendar May-26-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

Defendant's Motion to Set Aside Default

is DENIED. Defendant failed to comply with Code of Civil Procedure section 473(b) requiring that the application be accompanied by a copy of the answer or other pleading proposed to be filed therein.

Prevailing Party to submit proposed order that is in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b).

Visiting Judge: Dennis Hayashi; Clerk: K. Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)
